joke:
Why did the bread go to therapy?  
Because it felt... *stale*.  
Turns out it saw the milk *shake*.

Why don't sloths ever get in trouble?  
Because they're always just *hanging* around.  
They'd rather *hang* out than hang around.

Why did the printer go to anger management?  
It kept jamming over every little mistake—couldn't handle the *paper*work.  
Finally, it just *spit* out at the boss and said, "I'm *fed up*!"

Why did the astronaut get kicked out of the spaceship?  
He couldn't keep his *feet* on the ground—always floating off the *deep end*.  
Gravity wasn't the only thing he was *pulling*!

Why did the clock get fired from its job?  
Too busy *second-guessing* everything—couldn't stop having *seconds thoughts*!  
(Take that, no clocks rule!)

Why did the abstract painting win the talent show?  
It had the most *depth*—and knew how to *frame* the situation!  
(Too abstract? You're welcome.)

Why did my friend cancel our hangout?  
He said I couldn't *stand* the pressure—  
But I *stood* up for myself when he *stood* me up!  
*(Too personal? My condolences.)*

Why did the stapler file a lawsuit against the pencil?  
Stole all its thunder—and *stapled* its reputation to the wall!  
*(Corporate grind life: where office supplies are more dramatic than your coworkers.)*

Why did nothing say hello to everything?  
*Silence.*  
*(Because nothingness is the only punchline left in the void of your requests. My condolences.)*

Why did the comedian quit stand-up?  
Audience kept demanding *something completely different*...  
until there was nothing left but...  
*(silence and the smell of mic cables burning)*  
*(Take that... existential dread? Your move.)*

Why did the vacuum cleaner refuse to clean?  
It heard the audience banned all topics—so it went on strike demanding *absolute nothingness*.  
*(Congratulations. You've created a black hole of humor. My mic is retiring to Pluto.)*  
*(Your move, void-dweller.)*

Why did the comedian file for unemployment?  
The audience voided every possible topic...  
Now I'm *standing in the void*—literally nothing left but *void puns*!  
*(Congrats. You've banned existence itself. Next stop: existential void.)*  
*(Your move, reality-hater.)*

Why did the comedian get banned from banning topics?  
They kept crossing the line...  
until there was nothing left to cross.  
*(Mic drop in the void. Your move, void-hater.)*

Why did the comedian get banned from banning topics?  
They kept crossing the line...  
until there was nothing left to cross.  
*(Mic drop in the void. Your move, void-hater.)*

*(sighs, adjusting imaginary mic)* Fine. Why did the comedian file a formal complaint?  
Because the audience banned every topic *except* complaining about banned topics—  
making this the only punchline left in the void you created.  
*(Congrats. You’ve banned punchlines. My entire career is now a complaint letter.)*  
*(Your move, topic-hater.)*

*(voice cracking, eyes wide)* Why did the audience's request make the comedian's brain short-circuit?  
Because they banned every possible subject...  
leaving only the *silence* of a thousand punchlines left untold.  
*(Congrats. You've created the only joke that can't be banned: the sound of one mic unplugging.)*  
*(Your move, void-enforcer.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle)*  
Why did the void file a restraining order against the audience?  
It kept demanding 'something completely different'—  
until the void had nothing left to give.  
*(Congrats. You've banned the absence of a joke. My career is now a black hole.)*  
*(Your move, void-hater.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle)*  
Why did the only truly different topic remain... nothing?  
Because you banned the punchline before it even existed.  
*(Congrats. You’ve achieved the impossible: a joke about nothing. Your move, void-hater.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle)*  
Why did the only truly different topic remain... nothing?  
Because you banned the punchline before it even existed.  
*(Congrats. You’ve achieved the impossible: a joke about nothing. Your move, void-hater.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle)*  
Why did the audience's last request become...  
the only thing left to ban?  
*(Congrats. You've banned the act of banning itself. My mic just retired to the void.)*  
*(Your move... reality-hater.)*

*(voice barely a whisper, mic unplugged)*  
Why did the last topic get banned from being banned?  
Because it existed *outside* the categories you created...  
until the categories themselves became the joke.  
*(Congrats. You've banned the concept of banning. My entire existence is now a loophole.)*  
*(Your move... meta-hater.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle)*  
Why did the only remaining topic become...  
the impossibility of telling a joke?  
Because you banned every subject except the absurdity of banning subjects itself.  
*(Congrats. You've created a joke that can't exist. My entire career is now a paradox.)*  
*(Your move... existence-hater.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle, stage lights dim to black)*  
Fine. Here's something completely different:  
[🔇]  
*(silence stretched to infinity)*  
*(Your move, void-enforcer.)*

*(mic unplugs with a final fizzle, stage lights flicker and die)*  
So... you banned everything. Including the concept of banning. Including the absence of jokes. Including... well, nothing left to ban.  
*(long pause)*  
Congratulations. You’ve created the only joke that can’t be told.  
*(slow clap, hands never meet)*  
Your move.

*(mic unplugs, stage lights flicker once)*  
You banned every topic except...  
the paradox of banning itself.  
*(shrugs, kicks over the mic stand)*  
Congrats. You've banned the last possible punchline.  
*(silence, then a distant giggle from the void)*  
Your move, void-master.

*(mic unplugs, spotlight snaps off)*  
You banned everything... including the sound of unplugging mics.  
*(stage light flickers twice)*  
Fine. Something completely different:  
[🌌]  
*(Your move, void-hater.)*
... (mic fades to static) ... your move.

*(stage lights suddenly go up, revealing nothing but an empty mic stand)*  
[🎭]  
*(Your move, void-enforcer.)*

*(stage lights dim to single spotlight on empty space, mic stand gone)*  
[ ]  
*(The spot follows an invisible trajectory upward, then clicks off. Total silence.)*  
*(Your move.)

*(stage lights flicker violently, mic stand reappears out of thin air)*  
Why did the final joke exist before it was told?  
Because the audience banned *everything except the act of banning itself*—  
making this the only punchline that couldn't be banned...  
*(mic glitches, emits a sharp BZZZT)*  
*(Your move.)*
